summary: Phase 7 Guidance Page testing completed - BSE Corporate Announcements scraping, filtering, pagination all working. Track Record and Learning Context endpoints verified. 1,100+ announcements from 150+ stocks in database.

minor.issue: Intermittent 502 timeout during heavy scraping load
minor.note: Transient issue - endpoint works when retried

issues: Stats cards not visible when page first loads (shows 0 results briefly before data loads) - minor UX issue

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: 'ok', service: 'BMIA'}
Backend: GET /api/guidance returns paginated items with total, page, limit, pages fields
Backend: GET /api/guidance?symbol=HDFCBANK filters by stock symbol correctly
Backend: GET /api/guidance?category=Board%20Meeting filters by category correctly
Backend: GET /api/guidance?search=dividend searches headlines correctly
Backend: GET /api/guidance pagination works (page 1 and page 2 have different items)
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stats returns total_announcements (1100+), total_stocks (150+), categories (7), recent_7d
Backend: GET /api/guidance/stocks returns list of stocks with announcement counts
Backend: POST /api/guidance/scrape returns job_id with status 'started'
Backend: GET /api/guidance/scrape/{job_id} polls job status correctly
Backend: Invalid job_id returns 404
Backend: GET /api/signals/track-record returns metrics (win_rate, avg_return, equity_curve, by_sector, by_confidence)
Backend: GET /api/signals/learning-context returns AI learning data (lessons, sector_stats, timeframe_stats)
Backend: PDF URLs follow BSE format (https://www.bseindia.com/xml-data/corpfiling/AttachLive/...)
Frontend: Guidance page accessible at /guidance
Frontend: Stats cards show Total Filings, Stocks Covered, Last 7 Days, Categories
Frontend: Guidance items list shows stock symbol, category badge, headline, date, PDF link
Frontend: Stock filter dropdown opens and filters items correctly
Frontend: Category filter dropdown works
Frontend: Search headlines filter works
Frontend: Pagination works (prev/next buttons, page indicator)
Frontend: 'Guidance' nav item appears in sidebar with BookOpen icon
Frontend: PDF download links are clickable and point to bseindia.com
Frontend: Track Record page shows metrics, equity curve, performance by sector/confidence
seed_data_creation: BSE scraper populated 1,100+ announcements from 150+ stocks automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Guidance page fully tested. BSE scraper is actively running and adding more data. Current stats: 1,100+ announcements, 150+ stocks, 7 categories. Daily scheduler runs at 5 AM IST. Track Record and Learning Context endpoints working. All Phase 6 features (God Mode, Full Market Scanner) remain functional.

phase_7_assessment.guidance_stats_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns total_announcements, total_stocks, categories, recent_7d
phase_7_assessment.guidance_items_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Paginated items with filters (symbol, category, search)
phase_7_assessment.guidance_stocks_endpoint: ✅ WORKING - Returns stocks with announcement counts
phase_7_assessment.frontend_guidance_page: ✅ WORKING - Stats cards, items list, filters, pagination
phase_7_assessment.frontend_sidebar_nav: ✅ WORKING - Guidance nav item with BookOpen icon
